overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hitman 3 showing Agent 47 navigating through the Burj Al-Ghazali skyscraper in Dubai. The character moves from a security control room through utility areas and emerges onto a luxurious outdoor terrace and grand ballroom during golden hour, filled with guests in formal attire.

scene_state.functional_zone: security control room with monitoring stations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the security room toward the monitoring station

notable_agents.action: security guard seated at desk monitoring screens
security guard standing at attention near the wall

entered.detail: large wall of surveillance monitors displaying camera feeds
golden logo of the building between the monitor displays
black desk with computer equipment in front of the monitors
tall black shelving unit with electronic equipment

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 walks through a dimly lit security control room featuring a large wall of surveillance monitors displaying the Burj Al-Ghazali emblem. Two security guards in white uniforms are present—one seated at a control desk and another standing at attention—while the character moves steadily toward the back of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: utility storage room with lockers and equipment

events.description: exits security control room and enters utility storage area
approaches and opens metal door leading to dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the utility room toward the exit door

entered.detail: tall gray metal locker cabinets against the wall
white cabinet units with drawers and countertops
metal shelving with various equipment and supplies
gray metal exit door with push bar

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sterile utility storage room containing metal lockers, white utility cabinets, and equipment shelves. The space is empty of people, and the character walks toward a metal exit door at the far end, opening it to reveal a dark corridor beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor observation terrace with blue flooring

events.description: emerges from dark corridor into bright golden hour sunlight
transitions from indoor utility area to outdoor terrace

agents.ego_description: stepping out onto the terrace and walking across the blue floor toward the crowd

notable_agents.action: security guard in white uniform standing near the entrance doorway

entered.detail: vibrant blue tiled flooring covering the terrace surface
large structural steel beams supporting the overhead canopy
colorful hot air balloon visible in the distant sky
large opening leading into the interior ballroom

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark corridor, the character emerges onto a bright outdoor terrace with striking blue flooring, immediately encountering intense golden hour sunlight. Guests are silhouetted against the sky, and a colorful hot air balloon floats in the distance as the character approaches the entrance to a grand interior hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ballroom with blue curtains and golden decor

events.description: enters the grand ballroom from the outdoor terrace

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded ballroom past groups of socializing guests

entered.detail: tall luxurious blue velvet drapes hanging from ceiling to floor
ornate gold-colored structural columns with intricate designs
large circular inlaid design on the dark marble floor
spherical hanging light fixtures illuminating the space

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent grand ballroom filled with dense crowds of guests in formal attire, including traditional white robes. The space features dramatic blue velvet curtains, golden decorative pillars, and spherical chandeliers, with the character weaving through socializing groups toward an ornate archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate gallery with golden archways overlooking the city

events.description: enters area with intense golden sunlight streaming through glass walls
slows and stops at the railing to look out at the city view

agents.ego_description: walking through the golden gallery and stopping at the railing to overlook the city

notable_agents.action: guest in white traditional attire standing at railing looking out window

entered.detail: intricate golden metal archways with leaf-like patterns creating a tunnel effect
floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing the cityscape outside
decorative metal balustrade along the edge of the viewing area

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrow gallery defined by ornate golden archways, the character is bathed in intense golden hour sunlight streaming through the glass curtain wall. The space offers panoramic views of the city below, and the character stops at the metal railing to observe the scenery, joining a few other guests at the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sterile, dimly lit depths of a security hub into the opulent, sun-drenched heights of a luxury skyscraper. It begins in a dark security control room filled with surveillance monitors and guards before moving through a sterile utility storage area of metal lockers and white cabinets. As the character exits a dark corridor, the scene abruptly opens onto a bright outdoor terrace with blue flooring, where the lighting shifts to an intense golden hour glow featuring silhouetted guests and a distant hot air balloon. The camera then glides into a magnificent grand ballroom characterized by blue velvet curtains and golden pillars, weaving through crowds in formal attire toward an ornate archway. Finally, the movement leads into a narrow gallery where sunlight streams through a glass curtain wall, ending at a metal railing with a panoramic view of the city below.
